name: Baklazhannaya Ikra (Eggplant Caviar Odessa St
recipeIngredient: 1 large Eggplant, (1 ½ to 1 ¾ lbs)
1 medium Tomato, meaty, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Pierce the eggplant several times with a knife and bake on a baking sheet until soft, about 50 minutes, turning midway through the baking time.
3. Remove from the oven and let cool.
4. Cut the eggplant lengthwise into halves.
5. Scoop out the pulp and chop finely.
6. In a large bowl, combine the pulp with the onion, tomato, garlic, olive oil, and vinegar. Blend thoroughly.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Cover and refrigerate for several hours.
9. Serve in a dish garnished with chopped parsley.
10. Serve with pita triangles or cocktail rye bread.
